name: Caramel Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
--------------------PREHEAT OVEN TO 350--------------------
1) Prepare the cake mix as directed on the box and pour 2 cups of the batter into a greased (and floured) 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan. Bake for 15 minutes.
2) Meanwhile, in a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the caramel candies and butter with the milk, stirring until smooth. Spread evenly over the cake. Spread remaining cake mix over the caramel mixture, top with the nuts.
3) Return to the oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched. Cool and garnish as desired.
